name: TruthKeep Memory — Easy Mode
description: Local-first AI memory focused on remembering what is still true. Easy Mode exposes only the five safest tools for non-technical users.

tools.name: memory_remember
tools.description: [Basic] Store a piece of information into memory using natural language.

tools.name: memory_recall
tools.description: [Basic] Retrieve memories related to a query using natural language.

tools.name: memory_correct
tools.description: [Basic] Correct or update an existing piece of information in memory.

tools.name: memory_status
tools.description: [Basic] Check TruthKeep memory health, local storage status, and readiness.

tools.name: memory_profile
tools.description: [Basic] Show what TruthKeep remembers about you: identity, preferences, projects, and recent facts.

skills.name: Remember current truth
skills.description: Store important facts that should remain true until corrected.

skills.name: Recall current truth
skills.description: Recall the latest valid facts and avoid superseded facts.

skills.name: Correct memory
skills.description: Update wrong or outdated memory while preserving why-not history.
